Off Calendar Dec-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michon M. Herrin of Walkup Melodia Kelly Wecht & Schoenberger, 981-7210, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Bryan Vereschagin of Gonzalez & Leigh, LLP, 512-2000, appearing for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BIG BILLY, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is denied because triable issue of material fact as to whether defendant exercised ordinary care to keep property in a reasonably safe condition on the afternoon of the incident. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
